$Comment: Generic, parameterless RootInteraction (new feature: press-F custody retrieval) - ONE shared jar asset every custody display entity in every installed pack references from its own Interactions component (station.StationCustodyDisplay#addRetrieveInteraction), never authored per-station like RPG_Station_Sawmill_Use.json. No per-station param: the clicked entity ref alone identifies its owning claim (see interaction.StationRetrieveInteraction).
